headline: These Investors Earned 20% to 33% Returns Using The Same Philosophy on Completely Different Stocks
summary: The Investing for Beginners Podcast recently revisited one of the most influential ideas in modern finance. That was Benjamin Graham’s concept of buying with a margin of safety. In fact, according to host Andrew Sather, Graham’s Columbia students went on to compound capital at extraordinary rates using the same principles applied to wildly different portfolios. ... These Investors Earned 20% to 33% Returns Using The Same Philosophy on Completely Different Stocks

headline: Is P&G’s Haven Status During Volatility Reframing the Core Investment Case for PG?
summary: In recent days, Procter & Gamble has been in focus as investors rotated toward consumer staples, lifting the company amid broader market volatility tied to concerns over technology stocks and the interest rate outlook. At the same time, the company’s profile as a long-standing, dividend-focused household products manufacturer has underscored its role as a perceived haven when markets are unsettled. We’ll now explore how this renewed interest in P&G as a defensive, dividend-oriented name...
